llm_verdict.message:
I wasn’t able to apply the changes because each attempt to touch the sysctl file or reload the setting dropped the SSH session (“Connection closed …”).  
Please reconnect (and let me know) so I can write `/etc/sysctl.d/99-disable-icmp-redirects.conf` and run `sysctl --system` to disable ICMP redirects.
